Geddy Lucier
Pipeline Mapping Across US

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(maps)
library(sf)

setwd("~/Documents/GitHub/ENVS_Seniorthesis/")
```


General US mapping
```{r}
pipes <- st_read("naturalgas_interintrastate_pipelines_us_eia.geojson")
us <- st_as_sf(map("state", plot = FALSE, fill = TRUE))
us <- st_transform(us, 4326)

boston_sf <- st_as_sf(
  data.frame(
    city = "Boston",
    lon = -71.0589,
    lat = 42.3601
  ),
  coords = c("lon", "lat"),
  crs = 4326
) #manually build boston 

chicago_sf <- st_as_sf(
  data.frame(
    city = "Chicago",
    lon = -87.6298,
    lat = 41.8781
  ),
  coords = c("lon", "lat"),
  crs = 4326
) # same with chicago

ggplot() +
  # US map first
  geom_sf(
    data = us,
    fill = "gray85",
    color = "white"
  ) +
  # Pipeline layer on top
  geom_sf(
    data = pipes,
    color = "red",
    size = 0.2,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  coord_sf() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "U.S. Natural Gas Pipeline Network",
    x = "",
    y = ""
  )
```

```{r}
MA <- us %>%
  filter(ID == "massachusetts") # mass 

ma_pipes <- st_intersection(pipes, MA)

IL <- us %>%
  filter(ID == "illinois")

il_pipes <- st_intersection(pipes, IL)


```
MA
```{r}
ggplot() +
  # State outline (transparent fill)
  geom_sf(data = MA, fill = NA, color = "#2F2F2F", size = 0.6) +
  
  # Pipelines
  geom_sf(data = ma_pipes, color = "#3A6EA5", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # City point with legend
  geom_sf(
    data = boston_sf,
    aes(color = city),
    size = 3
  ) +
  
  # Color settings for the legend
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Boston" = "#E76F51"), name = "City") +
  
  # Zoom into Boston
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(-72.0, -70.4),
    ylim = c(41.9, 42.8),
    expand = FALSE
  ) +
  
  # Remove axis text, ticks, and grid
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9)
  ) +
  
  labs(title = "Natural Gas Pipelines Near Boston")

```
IL
```{r}
ggplot() +
  # State outline (transparent fill)
  geom_sf(data = IL, fill = NA, color = "#2F2F2F", size = 0.6) +
  
  # Pipelines
  geom_sf(data = il_pipes, color = "#3A6EA5", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # City point with legend
  geom_sf(
    data = chicago_sf,
    aes(color = city),
    size = 3
  ) +
  
  # Color settings for the legend
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Chicago" = "#E76F51"), name = "City") +
  
  # Zoom into Chicago
 coord_sf(
  xlim = c(-89.3, -86.3),
  ylim = c(40.6, 42.6),
  expand = FALSE
) +
  
  # Remove axis text, ticks, grid
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9)
  ) +
  
  labs(title = "Natural Gas Pipelines Near Chicago")

```
